subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him whose name was brought before Our Presence in this Most Great Prison. No servant is there but We have remembered him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من حضر اسمه لدی الوجه فی هذا السجن العظیم ما من عبد الا و قد ذکرناه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
